title: AI Automation Agency Launch Playbook
description: A step-by-step guide for beginners learning n8n who want to start and scale an AI automation agency, covering client acquisition, service offerings, and growth strategies.
gumroad_description:
You learned n8n. Now what? Most people get stuck between "I can build automations" and "I can get paid to build automations." This playbook closes that gap.

Who this is for:
— Beginners who've finished a few n8n tutorials and want to turn the skill into income
— Freelancers already doing web or dev work who want to add a high-margin service
— 9-to-5ers who want a real roadmap before quitting, not just inspiration

What's inside:
— A service menu built for what clients actually pay for, not what looks cool on demos
— A client acquisition sequence you can run without an audience or cold calling experience
— Pricing frameworks that position you as a specialist, not a cheap freelancer
— A growth path from first client to repeatable agency model
— A quick-reference summary so you can act fast without rereading everything

This is a focused, practical guide. No fluff, no theory — just the playbook.

Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
